Jianye New Life Co., Ltd.
(Incorporated in the Cayman Islands with limited liability)
(Stock code: 9983)
Notice of Annual General Meeting
This is to inform that Jianye New Life Co., Ltd. (the "Company") is hereby scheduled to start on June 1, 2026 (Monday)
10:00 Noon: 16th Floor, Tower 2, Gateway Tower, Harbor City, 25 Canton Road, Tsim Sha Tsui, Kowloon, Hong Kong
The Annual General Meeting (the “Meeting”) is held in Rooms 1602–1605 to deal with the following matters:
1. To review and approve the audited consolidated financial statements for the financial year ended December 31, 2025 and
The report of the directors of the Company (the “Directors”) and the report of the Company’s independent auditors.
2. (A) To re-elect Mr. Yan Xuewen as executive director.
(B) To re-elect Mr. Liang Xiang as an independent non-executive director.
(C) To re-elect Ms. Luo Ying as an independent non-executive director.
(D) Authorize the board of directors (the "Board") to determine the remuneration of each Director.
3. Re-appoint Bochun Certified Public Accountants Co., Ltd. as the company’s auditor and authorize the Board of Directors to make the decision
Its remuneration for the year ending December 31, 2026.
4. Consider and, as appropriate, pass (with or without amendments) the following resolutions proposed in the form of special matters
